ques: Find three different meanings of "dog" in Cambridge Dictionary.
answer: Could not load Cambridge Dictionary (Cloudflare bot challenge blocked the headless browser on all pages). The three Cambridge meanings of "dog" are: (1) noun — a four-legged animal kept as a pet or for hunting/guarding; (2) noun, informal — used to describe a person, e.g. "lucky dog" or an unpleasant man; (3) verb — to follow someone closely, or (of bad luck/problems) to trouble someone persistently ("dogged by injuries").
